seed_document.title: Seed document title
seed_document.source_layer: freeform source label, such as notes, essays, bookmarks, hermes, openclaw, etc.

origin_vision.vision: One sentence that presents the seed's original way of seeing the world, without explanation.
origin_vision.emotional_pressure: The pain, anxiety, shock, longing, or unresolved pressure behind that vision.
origin_vision.simple_truth: The simplest judgment left after burning away defense, argument, and system.
search_text: Semantic search text for the seed's original vision.
Semantic search text for distant structural echoes of that vision.

core_summary: The central meaning of the seed document.
core_claim: The one sentence the seed most wants to prove or express.

core_concepts.name: Concept name
core_concepts.meaning: What the concept means in this seed.
search_text: Semantic search text for one expansion direction.

tensions.description: Conflict, contradiction, or tension inside the seed.
tensions.why_it_matters: Why this tension deserves echoes in the corpus.

mechanisms.name: Mechanism name
search_text: Semantic search text for similar mechanisms.
Semantic search text for similar failures.

questions_to_dream_on.question: Question worth sending back into the corpus.

avoid_searching_for: Direction likely to create topic overlap without a useful connection.
evidence_spans: Short exact span from the seed document.
